name: DLH Holdings Corp.
summary: DLH Holdings Corp. delivers health and readiness solutions for U.S. federal government customers through three service lines: Digital Transformation and Cyber Security, Science Research and Development, and Systems Engineering and Integration. Key customers include HHS, VA, and DoD. Services include IT modernization, cybersecurity, clinical trials research, epidemiology studies, C5ISR engineering, and pharmacy/logistics support via the VA's CMOP program. Revenue for FY2025 was $344.5 million.

products.name: Digital Transformation and Cyber Security
products.description: AI/ML, cloud enablement, cybersecurity, big data analytics, and zero trust architecture for federal civilian and defense customers.

products.name: Science Research and Development
products.description: Large-scale data analytics, clinical trials research, epidemiology studies, and health informatics for HHS, NIH, CDC, and Military Health System.

products.name: Systems Engineering and Integration
products.description: C5ISR, modeling and simulation, software engineering, IT operational resilience, and lifecycle logistics support for federal customers.

products.name: CMOP Pharmacy and Logistics Services
products.description: Pharmacy and logistics services at VA Consolidated Mail Outpatient Pharmacy regional locations generating $116.4M in FY2025 revenue.
